parameters.query: SELECT workflow_name, trigger_type, status, COUNT(*) as run_count, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (finished_at - started_at))) as avg_duration_sec, MIN(started_at) as first_run, MAX(finished_at) as last_run FROM workflow_runs WHERE started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY workflow_name, trigger_type, status ORDER BY run_count DESC

SELECT workflow_name, COUNT(*) as error_count, MAX(error_timestamp) as last_error, MAX(error_message) as sample_error FROM errors WHERE error_timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY workflow_name ORDER BY error_count DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_processed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.category = 'urgent') as urgent_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.category = 'finance') as finance_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.category = 'newsletter') as newsletter_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.action = 'archive') as archived_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.action = 'draft') as drafts_count, ROUND(AVG(p.priority_score), 1) as avg_priority FROM gmail_messages m LEFT JOIN gmail_processing_state p ON m.message_id = p.message_id WHERE m.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
INSERT INTO workflow_runs (workflow_name, trigger_type, status, started_at, finished_at, payload_summary) VALUES ('Daily-SuperAgent-Report', 'cron', 'success', NOW(), NOW(), $1)

meta.description: Daily Super Agent Report: runs at 07:00, fetches agent activity from Super Agent API, workflow execution logs, error summary, and Gmail processing stats from PostgreSQL, compiles HTML report, and emails to admin.
